stemHtml: On a commercial transport aircraft, how is the delivery of oxygen to the passenger masks controlled once the passenger oxygen system has been activated?

options.a: Once activated, the chemical oxygen generator provides oxygen for a limited time and cannot be stopped or restarted.
options.b: The crew can reduce, stop, or restart the oxygen flow to each passenger from the cockpit.
options.c: The oxygen flow is controlled automatically by the cabin pressurisation controller.
options.d: The oxygen generators supply oxygen continuously until the cabin altitude decreases below 10 000 ft.
